subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the Call that hath been raised betwixt earth and heaven. By God! Wert thou to behold His grandeur and majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد اسمع ندآء الذی ارتفع بین الارض و السما تالله لو تطلع بعظمته و عظمه
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual transformation, @call to action
